name: AlgebraicJacobian_Picard_TensorObjInverse.lean.md
content:
# AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjInverse.lean

## B1-crux `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict` (was sorry L493) — RESOLVED at this level

### Approach (iter-051)
The opaque B1-crux is the **`forget`-transport of the sheaf-level `unit_leftAdjointUniq`
identity** for `restrictFunctorIsoPullback`, with the pullback-unit leg replaced by its
sheafification factorisation. Decomposed the crux unit-coherence into four named parts:

- **(I)** `hadj.unit.app M.val = (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).map ((restrictAdjunction f).unit.app M)` — **`rfl`** (the presheaf presentation adjunction `hadj` is the `forget`-image of the sheaf `restrictAdjunction f`, both `pushforwardPushforwardAdj`).
- **(II)** Mathlib `Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app` (sheaf level) ⇒
  `restrictAdj.unit = pullbackAdj.unit ≫ (pushforward f).map ρ.inv` (`hII2`, term-mode, since `rw [Category.assoc]` MISSES on the `SheafOfModules ≫` seam).
- **(III)** new lemma **`sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq`** (the genuine sheafification-boundary content; see below) — `forget (sheaf pullback unit) = presheaf-pullback-unit ≫ (pushforward φ').map (η ≫ forget pbv)`.
- **(IV)** `forget ∘ (pushforward f).map = (pushforward φ').map ∘ forget` — **`rfl`** (defeq, applied term-mode).

These assemble (I→II→IV→III + `Functor.map_comp`/`Category.assoc` **all term-mode**, because the
`SheafOfModules ≫` is defeq-but-not-syntactic so every `rw` of a category lemma misses) into a
complete proof of `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict`. **`H1inv` is now sorry-free**, hence the B1
keystone `tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap` is sorry-free at its level too.

### Result: RESOLVED (H1inv body), residual moved into `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq`.
- **Key insight:** the crux is NOT a "B2-style conjugate telescope" (the prior planned route);
  it is the `forget`-transport of the sheaf `unit_leftAdjointUniq` triangle, with the genuine
  content confined to one leg (the sheaf-pullback-unit ↔ presheaf-pullback + sheafification
  comparison). `Adjunction.eq_unit_comp_map_iff` is the clean transposer (avoids the
  higher-order-unification failure of `rw [← homEquiv_unit]`).
- **Dead ends:** `rw [Category.assoc]`, `rw [Functor.map_comp]`, `rw [show A = B from map_comp]`
  ALL fail on the `SheafOfModules ≫` seam (defeq-not-syntactic) — confirms the memory warning;
  must apply category lemmas term-mode (`Eq.trans`/`congrArg`/`:=`). `Functor.map_id` /
  `Functor.map_comp` need `CategoryTheory.` qualification (name clash with the lawful-functor one).
  `set φ' := …`/`letI φ'` do NOT fold the goal's unfolded `(Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom`.

## `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (NEW helper, sorry L438) — PARTIAL (reduced to one explicit mate identity)

### Statement
`forget ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f).unit.app M)
  = (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction φ').unit.app M.val
    ≫ (pushforward φ').map (η_Y.app (pullback φ' M.val) ≫ forget (pullbackValIso f M).hom)`.

### Progress
Transposed across the presheaf pullback adjunction via `Adjunction.eq_unit_comp_map_iff`, then
unfolded `pullbackValIso` and applied `sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq`, reducing the
goal to a **single fully-explicit `leftAdjointUniq` mate identity**:

```
(pullback φ').map (forget (pullbackAdj_sheaf.unit.app M)) ≫ counit_pre.app _
  = η_Y.app (pullback φ' M.val)
    ≫ forget ((A.leftAdjointUniq B).inv.app M.val ≫ (pullback_sheaf f).map (ε_X.app M))
```
with `A = sheafAdj_X.comp pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_sheaf`,
`B = pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_pre φ' .comp sheafAdj_Y`, `ε_X = sheafAdj_X.counit`.

### Remaining blocker (named, specific)
The *abstract* sheaf pullback unit `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f` is built by
`Adjunction.ofIsRightAdjoint`, hence **opaque to `simp`/`aesop`** (`aesop_cat` normalises
`forget _.map` to `.val` but cannot close — it is not formal). To proceed it must be related to the
*concrete* `SheafOfModules.PullbackConstruction.adjunction φ` (whose `homEquiv` is
`sheafAdj_X ∘ pullbackAdj_pre ∘ forget`) via the Mathlib bridge
`Scheme.Modules.pullbackIso φ = Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq (pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f)
(PullbackConstruction.adjunction φ)` plus the `unit_leftAdjointUniq`/`leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_counit`
family — the same mate calculus as the root `leftAdjointUniqUnitEta` / `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`
(~80–150 LOC). This is the precise next step; the reduction above is all compiling forward progress
(documented in-code at the sorry).

## Build state
`lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjInverse` **EXIT 0**, zero new axioms.
Sorries 6 → 6 (count unchanged) but **B1-crux H1inv CLOSED**; the residual is now the far more
tractable `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (one explicit mate identity, opaque-unit bridge named).
Remaining sorries: `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (L438), S2 (L690), S3 (L715), S4a (L740),
S4b (L756), `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L828).

## Did NOT attempt
S2/S4b (secondary; gated on full B1-crux closure per directive — B1-crux not fully closed yet, the
reduced residual remains). S3/S4a (deferred dual gap). `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (telescope
of the squares).

## Needs blueprint entry
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (L437, TensorObjInverse.lean) —
  NEW helper. Statement: the sheaf pullback–pushforward adjunction unit, transported by
  `SheafOfModules.forget`, factors as the presheaf pullback–pushforward unit followed by the
  sheafification unit and `pullbackValIso` (through `forget`). Proof relies on:
  `Adjunction.eq_unit_comp_map_iff`, `pullbackValIso` (def, root),
  `sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq` (root). Residual: the `pullbackIso`-comparison
  mate identity (see above). Blueprint should add a `\label`+`\lean`+`\uses` block; it is a sibling
  of `lem:h1inv_app_eq_pullbackval_restrict` (Part III of that crux) — suggest
  `lem:sheaf_pullback_unit_forget_eq`, and add it to the `\uses` of
  `lem:h1inv_app_eq_pullbackval_restrict`.

## Summary
- Sorry count before → after: **6 → 6** (count identical, but B1-crux `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict` is now **closed**; its residual is replaced by the new, far-reduced `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq`).
- Sorries closed: `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict` (L493 in the iter-050 file).
- Sorries still open: `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (NEW, the reduced B1-crux core — one explicit `leftAdjointUniq` mate identity, blocker = opaque `ofIsRightAdjoint` unit needs the `pullbackIso` bridge), S2, S3, S4a, S4b, `trivialisation_restrict_compat`.
- New compiling lemmas: `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (proof reduced to one explicit identity, not a bare sorry); `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict` fully proven (parts I/II/IV + assembly).
- Adjacent sorries beyond assigned: not attempted (gated on full B1-crux closure; B1-crux residual remains).

## Why I stopped
**Partial progress (substantial, verified).** Closed the B1-crux engine `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict`
entirely (parts I, II, IV proven term-mode; assembly compiles, `lake build` EXIT 0). This is the
directive's prescribed **effort-break**: the crux unit-coherence is decomposed into four named
sub-claims at the sheafification-unit seam, three fully discharged, the fourth (`sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq`)
**reduced** — via two correct transposition steps (`eq_unit_comp_map_iff`) and the
`sheafificationCompPullback`/`pullbackValIso` unfold — from an opaque coherence to ONE fully-explicit
`leftAdjointUniq` mate identity. The sole remaining blocker is precise and named: the abstract sheaf
pullback unit (`Adjunction.ofIsRightAdjoint`) must be made concrete via
`Scheme.Modules.pullbackIso`/`PullbackConstruction.adjunction` — a ~80–150 LOC mate-calculus mirroring
the root `leftAdjointUniqUnitEta` family. Not user-escalation; the next prove pass should target
`sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq`'s explicit residual with the `pullbackIso` bridge (or a
mathlib-analogist pass on "abstract `ofIsRightAdjoint` unit vs concrete sheafify∘pullback∘forget unit").
